programme.title: The Invaders
programme.desc: When a hurricane mysterious avoids a church building, David investigates.

programme.title: The Life and Times of Grizzly Adams
programme.desc: "Adams recalls the tale of how he met Nakoma when he was a new "Greenhorn" to the ways of the wilderness. How Nakoma helped him learn survival and also the tribal ceremony that bonded their friendship as Blood Brothers."

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: "Marlin and Jim visit the mountain prairies of Wyoming where falcons, eagles and hawks rule the air."

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: "Marlin and Jim follow a pair of black bear cubs in Yellowstone National Park; track a large black bear to tag for future reference."

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: "Marlin and Jim go on a thrilling adventure in South Africa to catch lions, hippos and elephants for scientific and conservation purposes."

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: "With Marlin and Jim you follow the raccoon family in their adventures in a remote valley amid the scenic splendor of southern Utah."

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: "To Marlin and Jim, Africa’s waters mean the chance to film the most exciting dramas and most unusual animals ever captured by the camera. Crocodiles are among the largest reptiles in the world and the most feared!"

programme.title: Mutual of Omaha's Wild Kingdom
programme.desc: "In the hostile mountains and deserts of Mexico roams one of the world’s most beautiful and dangerous cats…El Tigre the jaguar. Marlin and Jim track this predator through miles of inhospitable terrain."

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Marcia falls for Dr. Vogel, the family's new dentist. When he asks Mike if Marcia would be interested in doing some babysitting for his kids, she's mistakenly under the impression that he's asking her out on a date.

programme.title: The Brady Bunch
programme.desc: Jan receives a mysterious locket in the mail. Pretty soon a manhunt begins to find the sender, the only clue being the typewriter used to address the envelope drops its ‘y.’ When the locket mysteriously vanishes, Peter suggests they re-enact exactly what they were doing the night it disappeared.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: At the mansion, the clan is in need of food because the hunting in Beverly Hills is horrible. They call a catering company, but get mean-mouthed. At the bank, Drysdale gets a call and learns that he got a kangaroo from a friend and it is at his house.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Elly shows Granny an article about an old school mate getting engaged after having a coming out party. Granny tells Jed about this, and the clan decides to give Elly May a coming out party. Drysdale isn’t happy about hearing this, especially the spare-no-expense part and seeing the Clampetts’ country decorations. Drysdale decides to get someone to help with the task so the Clampetts don’t embarrass themselves, getting his wife to tend to them.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Ellie's decision to run for town council sparks a battle of the sexes.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Desperate to be in Ricky's new television commercial, Lucy makes every attempt to get her way, which eventually pays off. But her one-and-only chance flops when she is forced to test the sponsor's product over and over, a vitamin syrup called Vitametavegimin, which is 23% alcohol.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: June's birthday has Wally and Beaver fighting over what to buy with the $5 dollars that Ward gave them. Wally buys her a wallet while Beaver buys an ugly blouse that June kindly thanks him for, but she has a hard time bringing herself to wear it.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: "June, Ward and Wally are going out for the evening and not wanting to worry about Beaver, June calls a babysitter, despite Beaver's pleas against the idea."

programme.title: Charlie's Angels
programme.desc: Jill gears up as a roller derby star to solve a murder of the champ.

programme.title: Hart to Hart
programme.desc: "An up and coming artist's premature death exposes a collectors scheme to increase the value of his own collection."

programme.title: Fantasy Island
programme.desc: "A retired circus owner gathers her old acts together for 5-year reunion, dangerously aware that one of the performers wants her dead on Fantasy Island. An amateur bowler fulfills his dream of competing with the world's best professional bowlers on Fantasy Island."

programme.title: The Love Boat
programme.sub-title: How Do I Love Thee? / No More Alimony / Authoress! Authoress!
programme.desc: A man bound by alimony wants to make sure his ex goes through with her marriage; Julie's Aunt Sylvia and her pal Betsy try to interest a publisher in Betsy's memoirs.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Aunt Bee, saddened by the death of a friend, is feeling old and tired. She stumbles across a medicine man's presentation and is intrigued by his bottle of elixir, which she believes to add pep to her life.

programme.title: Collector's Call
programme.desc: "Jennifer Klein grew up in LA with a dad who worked in Hollywood, and her screen used Props & Costumes collection from TV shows like "CHIPs" and films like "Back To The Future" is stunning. Expert and longtime costume dealer Marcia Tysseling appraises Jen's collection and has brought some classic TV costumes to offer in trade."

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Klinger saves Winchester's life when an explosion rocks the operating room; and B.J. is reluctant to reveal the extent of his injuries after the blast.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Margaret develops a case of prickly heat, Charles does his tax returns and Klinger takes the P.A. apart—just some of the events that occur during another unendurably hot night at the 4077th.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Stephanie's father, Floyd, finally arrives with a devastating proposition for the Bunkers: They can keep Stephanie if they agree to pay him $1000 cash!

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: On Archie's St. Patrick's Day Party at the tavern, he discovers that Edith is terribly ill after doing a lot of cooking for him. Sidney comes to the rescue and is able to save Edith before it's too late and he also tells Archie that he knew about her illness before and so did Edith. Sidney mentions that he did tell Edith to stay off her feet, but obviously, with the cooking for Archie, she didn't listen to his instruction. Archie visits Edith upstairs and is disappointed that she didn't get rest instead of doing something for his party. Instead of leaving to host it, Archie falls asleep in the arms of his lover, Edith.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: It's Edith and Archie Bunker's 22nd wedding anniversary and their daughter Gloria and her husband Mike are planning a surprise Sunday brunch. Edith is pleasantly surprised, however, Archie's "no big deal" attitude leads to a huge argument with his son-in-law on topics ranging from Archie's prejudices, problems with the nation's government and Mike's atheism.

programme.title: All in the Family
programme.desc: Mike writes a letter to President Nixon protesting everything that's wrong with America, including the state of the environment and the nation's involvement in Vietnam. Archie finds out, and to refute his son-in-law's claims, he decides he also will write a letter to Tricky Dick, praising the nation's chief.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Raymond's pleasantly surprised with the laughs he gets at Debra's expense.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: When Debra's mother comes to visit, she wishes her mom were more like Marie.

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.desc: Rob describes Laura as a nut on TV...

programme.title: The Dick Van Dyke Show
programme.sub-title: I Was A Teenage Head Writer
programme.desc: Rob recalls how he became head writer and how Buddy and Sally really were.

programme.title: The Honeymooners
programme.desc: Ralph has an accident on his way to receiving his Safest Bus Driver Award.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The lone survivors of two annihilated worlds find themselves stranded together on a distant and uninhabited planet.

programme.title: The Alfred Hitchcock Hour
programme.desc: A man blackmails a couple by threatening to tell their adopted daughter the truth about her birth parents.

programme.title: Mission: Impossible
programme.desc: Syndicate man Dutch Krebbs controls a large gambling operation. After an undercover IMF agent with a camera-watch disappears, presumably with recorded evidence against Krebbs, the IMF must find the agent's body and the watch.

programme.title: The Fugitive
programme.desc: Kimble happens to watch a TV debate in which a once-renowned attorney, named G. Stanley Lazer, claims that he could reverse Kimble's criminal conviction if the case went back to trial. Lazer once a respected lawyer, had his license revoked after getting i

programme.title: Harry O
programme.desc: "Harry O takes on an unusual client when he tries to protect a murder suspect from syndicate killers."

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The policeman's role in court is highlighted in this episode.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon retrace a 14-year-old investigation to determine whether charges can be brought against a man up for parole.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed's investigation of a fatal shooting in a hotel room hinges on the eyewitness account of a hopeless wino named Harry who is desperate to make a name for himself. Meanwhile, they investigate a report of a peeping tom at the home of an exotic dancer.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: It's Malloy's birthday, but he's consumed with anger over the thought his colleagues might have a plan to throw him a surprise party. On a busy patrol, he and Reed make an ironic traffic stop while responding to a burglary call at an antique store, deal with an extremely embarrassed theft victim at a lingerie store, investigate suspicious activity at a service station, use a creative approach to apprehend a serial jewelry store burglar and engage in a shootout inside the police station's parking garage.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Toony hosts his very own talent showcase."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: June and Ward make Wally and Beaver promise that they won't go see a scary movie. However, Wally and Beaver are talked into seeing it, thanks to Wally's so-called best friend, Eddie Haskell. The movie has quite an influence on Beaver, who makes a voodoo doll, names it Eddie Haskell and sticks it with pins.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Wally and Beaver want to get brand-new bikes so they ask Ward for some money; however, he suggests that they earn the money. This leads Wally and Beaver to get a job delivering papers. Later, while trying to help the boys out, Ward and June inadvertently almost get Wally and Beaver fired.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Lurid Letter
programme.desc: A young widowed high school English teacher in a small town is accused via letter of making passes and more towards some of her male students. But a small town is a small town and it seems that all the key figures are involved.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: A reporter asks for Matlock's help in clearing a newlywed (Caryn Richman) charged with the murder of her husband.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O
programme.desc: A Japanese computer research company executive is recognized by a veteran as his former captor in a Philippine prison camp in World War II.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: Mary Ellen finds a ring in a purse she got. Belongs to a neighbor. Loses it at a dance

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Bull Bannock (Alan Hale), retired heavyweight champion of the world, attempts to make a home for himself in Dodge City, and tries to buy Miss Kitty's Longbranch Saloon.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Adam finds shelter overnight at a stagecoach way station. There he meets others ranging from a beautiful girl to a dangerous outlaw on the run.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: No one's more surprised than Micah when newcomer Leota Carraway claims he's her long-lost husband and the father of her child.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is torn by conflicting emotions when he meets the town's new preacher—a former outlaw whom he vowed to kill.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Millie Davis reluctantly takes in an orphaned baby girl. Eight years later the girl's grandmother arrives to retrieve her. But Millie doesn't want to give up the child, so she claims that she and Flint are the parents.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: The firemen plan to celebrate the imminent retirement of a martinet captain with a party, under the guise of throwing a farewell dinner. A model in a bear suit suffers from heat stroke during a promotion stunt. A bizarre family believes their sleeping mother is dead. The firemen rescue CHP officers from a helicopter.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Klinger's army newspaper reports on Hawkeye's monument to military stupidity; a giant tower made from a half million erroneously shipped tongue depressors.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye wagers that he can go a full day without a wisecrack, and Winchester finally confronts the major who exiled him to the 4077th.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Winchester is sent to inspect sanitary conditions on the frontlines, while the rest of the camp plans a surprise anniversary party for B.J.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: One of Margaret's nurses tries to hide her severe drinking problem, and Hawkeye is scorned after a practical joke he plays on Winchester backfires.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie has his first crush, who ignores him. Barney steps in and tries to give him advice about women, which leads to Opie developing a crush on Thelma Lou.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Barney believes that Andy should be getting married.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray decides to make the drastic move of "cutting the wires."

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert finally musters up the courage to move out on his own.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: The pilot centers on Blanche who has fallen in love, raising the possibility that her boarders will have to move out in the event of a marriage. When the wedding is called off Blanche finds comfort and love from her dearest friends.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.sub-title: Guess Who's Coming To The Wedding?
programme.desc: Dorothy's daughter, Kate, comes to Miami with an announcement.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.desc: In The Family, Eunice reunites with an old friend who's now a carefree divorcee.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Lame Canary
programme.desc: Ruth Prescott wants to divorce Walter Prescott so she can be with her true love, Jimmy MacLaine. After a brush with death, Ruth becomes convinced that Walter is trying to kill her, but then Walter turns up dead.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.sub-title: The 7th Is Made Up Of Phantoms
programme.desc: Three National Guardsmen explore the site of Custer's Last Stand and begin hearing strange noises.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: Suspense and romance fill the travel of an American reporter returning after a visit to an Iron Curtain nation.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A man looking for revenge goes undercover in a monastery but things do not turn out the way he planned.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix suspects foul play when colleague Wes Tully is discovered floating dead in his swimming pool.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: "After witnessing a murder, a woman flees to a sanitarium where she was once a patient. It's up to Cannon to find her and keep her safe."

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: J.R. is asked to find a man who hasn't been heard from since he became a mercenary.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday tracks down thieves responsible for a series of Los Angeles robberies.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: The search is on for a swindler who conned an old vaudevillian out of $9,000 he found on a sidewalk.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed suspect that a well-armed immigrant tailor who claims to be defending his establishment from burglars is actually plotting a murder. In the meantime, they deal with a drunken traveling businessman who passes out in a bar girl's car.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed investigate an interstate bounty hunter who has an invalid gun permit and questionable tactics. Meanwhile, they deal with an elderly man who strongly dislikes hippies, and a frustrated wife who desperately wants to receive a traffic ticket.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Bill and Toony travel to the Emerald Isle to celebrate St. Patrick's Day like the Irish."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Beaver is invited to Linda Dennison's birthday party and quickly discovers that he is the only boy that she invited. Fearing for his reputation, Beaver tries his best to get out of attending but June and Ward are insistent, not aware of the situation Beaver's in.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: The local bully, Lumpy Rutherford, has been picking on Beaver and Wally and, thanks to a story Ward tells them, the boys decide to play a joke on Lumpy. However, their ploy catches the wrong person: Lumpy's father and Ward's co-worker, Fred Rutherford, is caught in the trap.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Fickle Filly
programme.desc: After her father's death, a young woman finds herself penniless and alone. Then a present from her father—for which he paid $50,000—drops on her lap. However, it turns out to be worthless.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: When an abhorred doctor meets his end, four of his former medical students are considered likely suspects. Matlock, however, is tasked with defending the prime suspect, the man seen fleeing the scene of the crime.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O
programme.desc: The hit man sent to kill the witness to a two-year-old murder instead falls in love with her. McGarrett and the team must lead the search to find her before duty overtakes love.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: John Boy tutors another person on a scholarship

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: To Marshal Matt Dillon and his deputies falls their grimmest task in many years—the hanging of a ruthless gunman.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Hoss goes leprechaun hunting, hoping to find gold.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: The town of North Fork becomes a haven for outlaws when suave Ben Judson smooth-talks his way into the marshal's job.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A veteran returns with tales of heroism and the fate of Milly's brother in the Civil War.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: The major comes upon two Japanese men, attacked by Indians and heading towards California. He learns one of the men plans on committing hara kiri while others on the train have designs on a black box they suspect may contain precious gems.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: The computer fouls up and Gage gets a check for thousands instead of for hundreds. A transient is injured in a car at a junkyard. A victim’s dog causes problems. Two workers are trapped on a scaffold.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Colonel Potter nearly blows his stack when his well-intentioned colleagues mollycoddle him in order to lower his blood pressure.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: When Hawkeye can't stop a sneezing fit that has no apparent cause, psychiatrist Sidney Freedman digs into the surgeon's past for a clue to this unusual malady.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye is overcome by the devotion of a terminally ill G.I., who has leukemia, for his critically wounded buddy, but he has trouble coming to terms with the fact that he can't cure the man. Meanwhile, Father Mulcahy is worried about the impending visit of a Cardinal.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The 4077th is given a gift of fresh-grown vegetables by a grateful Korean; and Potter questions the veracity of an upbeat letter from Radar.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Visiting officials take pause when they visit Mayberry and find that the courthouse is full of dogs.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Andy and Barney visit the Darlings to rid them of Ernest T. Bass, who has his mind set on marrying daughter Charlene.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray is devastated, when his friend Andy, sells a piece to Sports Illustrated.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Raymond laments to his brother that marriage is like a prison.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Having not dated since her husband died, Rose reluctantly agrees to go on a blind date.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Blanche's sister, Virginia, comes to Miami for a visit.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.sub-title: Guests Dick Van Dyke And Tony Randall
programme.desc: In Death of a Salesman, Dick Van Dyke tries to sell encyclopedias, only he keeps getting hurt by Carol. Then, in Root of All Evil, Tony and Dick get into a squabble about money after one loses five dollars and the other burns a ten dollar bill. Finally, in Warning Signals, a couple uses hand signals with each other in an attempt to get rid of their house guests.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Spurious Sister
programme.desc: Bruce Chapman returns home early from a business trip to find that his wife, Marie, wants a divorce. Chapman is shocked at this turn of events because he thought his wife had recently been strangled to death.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An old man fears that he will die if his grandfather clock stops running.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A man plans to get rid of his nagging wife — permanently.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: Two twisted brothers scheme to speed up their inheritance by killing their aunt.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix sets out to prove the innocence of a young woman accused of shooting a businessman. A track leads Mannix to journalist Hackett, who was interviewing the victim moments before the crime.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: "A former convict gets Cannon to help him find the man who sent him to jail for no reason."

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: Barnaby investigates a vicious husband who beats his wife.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: This episode focuses on drugs, paying particular attention to addiction symptoms.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Police track down a thief who specializes in elderly people.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: On an unseasonably hot day, Malloy and Reed suspect that an elusive bicyclist who overreacts to having his air pump stolen in a park is actually a drug pusher. Meanwhile, their investigation of a two-month-long yard sale leads to an armed fugitive.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed begin today's patrol by investigating a deluded and reclusive parolee whose troubled girlfriend in the apartment next door has just attempted suicide for the second time. In the meantime, they provide vital information to a detective's search for an armed robbery suspect.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Mr. Quizzer starts a pillow company. Bill and Toony have loads of fun with the overstock."

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: After Ward's bragging about Wally and Beaver being responsible, Herb and Janet Wilson assume that it would be alright to leave their four-year-old daughter in Wally and Beaver's care while they go out to a party with Ward and June. However, the trouble begins when the youngster locks herself in the bathroom.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Ward tries to teach Wally and Beaver the importance of saving by giving them a piggy bank. The boys quickly save up a handful of change and are all ready to spend it on some baseball equipment. However, unknown to their parents, they change their minds and decide to spend the money on a most unselfish gift.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Polka-dot Pony
programme.desc: A wealthy woman is confronted by two girls who claim to be the daughters she was forced to abandon 20 years before.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock flies to England to represent Eric Gordon, a man accused of murdering his wealthy businessman father. While his sister is convinced of his innocence, his brother isn't so sure.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O
programme.desc: Five-O search for the criminals who set up Hawaiian singer and ecologist Jimmy Nuanu as the fall guy for a sewage plant bombing.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: A mountain man moves his family back to Walton's Mountain

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A vengeful prisoner poses a continual threat to the life of Marshal Matt Dillon.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Hoss helps out two young girls, whose father has just died, by taking them on a journey to their Aunt's place. Unbeknownst to Hoss, one of the girls carries a stolen bag of money and he soon finds out that there are others who are interested in both the money and the girls.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A head wound wipes out Lucas' memory, leaving him with only one clue: he's wearing an outlaw's gun.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A former neighbor of the McCain's is released from jail after serving his sentence for stage coach robbery, but the money was never found. Lucas agrees to let the man work for him, but the new work hand holds a secret.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: When a member of the train is placed in chains after breaking indian law by killing a buffalo, Major Adams quarrels with Flint, who quits and takes a job at nearby Tent City. White Eagle discovers the dead buffalo and demands justice.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: Roy and John try to go fishing in Santa Rosa County, but end up rescuing climbers from a cliff face and fishermen whose boat blew up. They also help the sheriff come up with ideas for implementing emergency medical services in his county.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: After Charles is nearly felled by a sniper's bullet, he develops a philosophical obsession with death. Meanwhile, the officers have all been assigned new responsibilities.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: "A touring USO show brings an unexpected touch of vaudeville to the 4077th when the star showgirl requires an emergency operation. And wouldn't you know, the comedian is Klinger's hero! "

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: A touring USO show brings an unexpected touch of vaudeville to the 4077th when the star showgirl requires an emergency operation. And wouldn't you know, the comedian is Klinger's hero!

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Father Mulcahy counsels a GI who is plagued by guilt because he has swapped tags with a dead colleague. Meanwhile, B.J. and Charles consider ways of keeping a soldier-salesman quiet.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: When the state police leave two captured bank robbers in the custody of the Mayberry police department overnight, Barney is determined to show the prisoners that the Mayberry jail is as good as any other.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Opie accidentally kills a mother bird with his new slingshot and takes it upon himself to raise the orphaned baby birds. After adopting them, Opie faces the difficult task of setting them free.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra, Ray and the kids make plans to spend the holiday at Frank and Marie's.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Everywhere Ray looks women are coming out to stop by and say "hi" to Robert.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Dorothy is dating Dr. Elliot Clayton. Dr. Clayton makes a pass at Blanche.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Blanche's 14-year old grandson comes to Miami for a visit.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.desc: In The Small Office, accountants systematically cram into the smallest office to get work done. Then, in The Clairvoyant. a department store salesman tells a writer his bleak future.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Watery Witness
programme.desc: Lorna Thomas is a has-been actress who once gave up her baby for adoption and lived to regret it. George Clark discovers that his wife might be Lorna's long-lost daughter and begins to see dollar signs.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A movie star receives a ring from her home town fan club. In it she sees the faces of people she knows telling her she's needed there.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: An old and eccentric woman is targeted by a crooked couple who think she has a lot of money stashed away.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: Arthur comes back from the afterlife to find out the identity of his murderer.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: Mannix is involved in a war of nerves when he deals with blackmailers threatening an entire town with nerve gas.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: Cannon is hired by a Cuban exile to investigate the death of the man's brother at the hands of law enforcement officials.

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: A woman with a shady past plots the murder of her blackmailer.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: A shooting case exemplifies how the police gather—and why they must sometimes withhold—evidence.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday investigates a woman's claim that her husband is an armed robber.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Reed starts a flu epidemic that decimates the city's police force, forcing him and Malloy to work a double shift. During day watch, he and Malloy encounter a bookmaker being held at gunpoint, mediate a dispute over a cantaloupe, investigate a possible robbery in progress, engage in a foot chase with an athletic young man and pull over a motorist who turns out to be a VIP.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Newly appointed Police Commissioner Edna Dixon accompanies Malloy and Reed on night watch, where they deal with a naked elderly wino at a bar, try to diffuse a possible riot situation following a gang-related stabbing and pursue a deaf teenager in a stolen car.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "Bill and Toony celebrate women who were spies!"

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Wally goes away on a trip with the Boy Scout troop that he belongs to, leaving a lonesome Beaver behind. Finding his friends to be busy, Beaver takes up other means to make the time go by.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Ward becomes a bit jealous when Wally and Beaver begin spending time playing basketball at Willie Dennison's house after Willie's dad put up a backboard and a basket. This prompts Ward to do the same thing but it just seems like things are working against him in his quest to be the perfect father.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Shoplifter's Shoe
programme.desc: Mason digs into a dead man's past in search of evidence to clear an accused murderer.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Matlock flies to England to represent Eric Gordon, a man accused of murdering his wealthy businessman father. While his sister is convinced of his innocence, his brother isn't so sure.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O
programme.desc: McGarrett and company must match wits against a veteran thief and robber who leaves Monopoly money at the scene of his crimes.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: John Boy participates in a dance marathon with Daisy

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: Festus Haggen is mistaken for a hired gunman and offered $300 to fight and run out of town the three sons of a man his cousin is accused of killing.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: Hoss is seriously injured on a cattle drive and Ben takes him to a nearby town in search of a doctor. To his dismay, Ben finds out that the only doctor available is in jail, waiting to be hung for murder.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Marshal Torrance is heading home from a cattle sale with Lucas and Mark when the old lawman mysteriously disappears. They trace him to a nearby Mexican ghost town.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After Alphonso's wife gives birth, the bandits holding Marshal Torrance relax their guard, enabling Lucas and Mark to rescue the old man.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Flint, at a grave, sees a man stabbed in the back with a note saying, "Deliver to Beauty Jamison." As that is the daughter of the man interred he pays a visit and sees a woman trying to continue a legacy with the locals trying to break her.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: Chet and Marco are drafted to sort out a filing dilemma caused by computer error. A kid falls in a storm drain and nearly drowns. The paramedics experience problems with a new supply nurse. A janitor drinks samples of an archeologist's Mesopotamian wine. The firemen respond to a warehouse fire.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The latest scuttlebutt affects everyone's behavior when a visiting Army rep is rumored to be recruiting for a new M*A*S*H unit. The gang fears that the 4077th will be split up.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Hawkeye writes a heartfelt letter to President Harry Truman to protest at the continued fighting in Korea. Meanwhile, Colonel Ditka has promised a much-needed water heater if the 4077th beautifies the camp.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: On the eve of a big poker game, B.J.'s pride is bruised when he finds out his wife is working as a waitress. And Potter takes driving lessons from Klinger.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: Winchester infuriates the camp when he hoards his stateside newspapers, and Hawkeye reunites two Korean brothers who have been fighting on opposite sides of the war.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: After Opie and his friend, Arnold, hit a baseball into the window of an old, abandoned house, they hear noises and run for help. Barney and Gomer go to investigate—and hear noises, too!

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.sub-title: Ernest T. Bass Joins The Army
programme.desc: Ernest T. wants to join the Army to impress a girl with the uniform. When he is refused induction, he goes on a window-breaking rampage.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray is overjoyed by the reaction he is getting from gifting a toaster to his family and friends.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray challenges Frank to a winner take all ping pong match.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: In a bowling competition, it's Dorothy and Blanche verses Rose and Sophia.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: After a Madonna concert, the girls arrive home, one evening, to discover their house has been broken into.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.desc: In The Family, Eunice is furious when her vacation gets canceled. Then, in The Digs, a married couple decides to tell each other the truth about what really bugs them about the other person, and it doesn't end well.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Garrulous Gambler
programme.desc: Larry Benton is a hard-luck guy. He gets in an argument in a poker game and knocks Mike Granger out cold. Then he is informed him that Granger is dead.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Driving home one rainy evening, a man accidentally hits a boy on a bicycle. Determined to hide his guilt, the man flees the scene—but his car has other ideas.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A man desperate for money takes on a strange job offer.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: A man finds his disappeared wife in a painting.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: After a string of strange accidents, a carnival-troupe boss employs Mannix to investigate the mishaps.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: "Cannon tries to find a girl who went missing after witnessing a murder."

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: The victim of a hit-and-run disappears as the sole witness calls an ambulance.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: Friday and Gannon confront a phony magazine salesperson.

programme.title: Dragnet
programme.desc: It's a job half done when police nab a narcotics manufacturer: they still need his backer.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy's headstrong and elderly apartment manager stages a protest at the station after she's victimized by a serial purse snatcher, and Malloy suggests a stakeout will be their only chance to apprehend the suspect. On patrol, he and Reed chase a suspicious vehicle into a lumber yard, and investigate the murder of a young man at his parents' home.

programme.title: Adam-12
programme.desc: Malloy and Reed search for a suspected child stealer who has escaped custody with the baby after being arrested for shoplifting baby formula. Meanwhile, Reed has to think quickly when he is held at gunpoint while responding to a burglary.

programme.title: Toon In With Me
programme.desc: "How many rounds will Bill go in the ring?"

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Wally begins to outgrow his "sloppy" phase and becomes much neater. This is noticed by Ward and June who try to encourage Beaver to undergo the same transformation. However, Beaver changing like that just seems too extraordinary of a task.

programme.title: Leave It to Beaver
programme.desc: Ward helps Beaver and Wally build a miniature race car powered by the lawn mower motor, and Ward makes the boys promise not to use it without his supervision. Later, Larry talks Beaver into taking it for a spin, resulting in the boys being pulled over by a traffic officer.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Bluffing Blast
programme.desc: A young girl searching for the father she has never seen seeks Mason's help when she's charged with murder.

programme.title: Matlock
programme.desc: Michelle defends college chum Andrea Morrow after she is accused of murdering her abusive lover, Clay Graham. Matlock soon becomes convinced that the murderer was Clay's blind friend, Arthur Hampton, but has a devil of a time proving how a blind man managed to carry off a near-perfect murder.

programme.title: Hawaii Five-O
programme.desc: Dan Williams' fiancee is murdered by a strangler who writes poetry in lipstick on his victims' legs. Danno resolves to catch the culprit who has other murderous plans to carry out.

programme.title: The Waltons
programme.desc: John Boy gets his book of short stories published

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A young gunman (Zalman King) falls for one of Kitty's saloon girls (Lane Bradbury) while waiting to kill Marshal Matt Dillon and rob the bank.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: When a guitar-strumming "traveling troubadour" is hired on at the Ponderosa, it is up to Adam to prove the minstrel's guilt or innocence when he is accused of a murder, before which a witness overheard singing.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lou Mallory has arrived in North Fork and quickly purchases land, which includes the hotel and Milly Scott's store. She pays higher prices than the sellers feel their properties are worth. Everyone is happy until they find out that Lou really is an astute businesswoman.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Townspeople brace for the worst when a new girl arrives—with symptoms of smallpox.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: When the wagon horses start to die of a disease, Adams is forced to send two feuding men to buy new horses with his emergency money. Two horses return, but with only one man, leading Adams to wonder whether he made a mistake.

programme.title: Emergency!
programme.desc: Johnny tries to win a ticket-selling contest. Dr. Backett blames himself when he is involved in a car accident that leaves the other driver dead and The driver's daughter refuses to speak. While repairing the squad, the paramedics find themselves in the middle of a shootout and treat a policeman with heart trouble. A boxcar full of ammonia complicates a fire on a pier.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: The military police think they've solved a rash of thefts at the 4077th when they apprehend Klinger with Hawkeye's stolen camera.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: B.J. and Hawkeye resolve to clear Klinger's name after he chooses Winchester to defend him at his military court-martial.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.desc: To boost post-yuletide morale on Dec 26, Potter has the officers and enlisted men change places for the day.

programme.title: M*A*S*H
programme.sub-title: Follies Of The Living - Concerns Of The Dead
programme.desc: While suffering a fever, Klinger communicates with the spirit of a dead soldier, Private Weston, who stays on to witness his own last rites.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: A visiting preacher gives a sermon about taking time to relax. In trying to create an atmosphere of relaxation on a Sunday afternoon, the townsfolk all end up running themselves ragged.

programme.title: The Andy Griffith Show
programme.desc: Briscoe Darling becomes obsessed with Aunt Bee after hearing her recite a poem, going as far as to kidnap her and bring her back to his shack in the hills.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Marie is hurt and disappointed after finding that beloved Ray lied to her.

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Robert's entire demeanor changes when he starts clubbing.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: Blanche goes all out to try to look good for her latest beau.

programme.title: The Golden Girls
programme.desc: After a dinner party, Sophia suffers an apparent heart attack.

programme.title: Carol Burnett and Friends
programme.sub-title: Butler And The Maid, The / Mrs. Wiggins
programme.desc: In The Butler and the Maid, a married couple channels their frustration for each other through their butler and maid. Then, in Mrs. Wiggins, Mr. Tudball tries to teach Mrs. Wiggins how to use the intercom again.

programme.title: Perry Mason
programme.sub-title: The Case Of The Blushing Pearls
programme.desc: Mitsuo Kamuri has been seeing a great deal of Grover Nichols, son of wealthy businessman Hudson Nichols. Nichols doesn't approve of his son's relationship and when Mitsuo is "caught" with a string of valuable pearls belonging to Mrs. Nichols, he agrees to absolve her if she stops seeing his son.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Before leaving on a 40-year mission, an astronaut meets a woman and they fall in love.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: Lawrence Appleby will do anything to keep his antiques shop, even murder.

programme.title: Alfred Hitchcock Presents
programme.desc: Karen has a problem with alcohol, one that leaves her wondering what happened the previous night.

programme.title: Mannix
programme.desc: A member of Mannix's Korean War Army unit is out for revenge for a wrong done to him in the past. But the man's odd confessions lead Mannix to believe he is suffering from combat fatigue.

programme.title: Cannon
programme.desc: "Cannon receives a confession from a dying hitman who says he was responsible for the murder of his wife and daughter 14 years ago."

programme.title: Barnaby Jones
programme.desc: A gang kidnaps J.R. and demands that he find out who killed the leader.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: After a derailment, Hooterville residents take over operation of the Cannonball from Homer Bedloe, and demand so many changes that the train's crew decides to quit.

programme.title: Petticoat Junction
programme.desc: Kate Bradley tangles with Selma Plout when Selma tries to lure pilot Steve Elliott into marriage with her daughter.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale wakes up to find she is no longer in the hospital but in her one hell—the Clampett mansion. After hearing she’s missing, her husband wants to sue the hospital. But when Jed and Jethro visit to return the mattress Mrs. Drysdale was on when they brought her home, the mystery of what happened is solved.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: An authority on American history finds evidence that Jed's ancestors preceded the Mayflower to America.

programme.title: Popeye and Pals
programme.sub-title: The Man On The Flying Trapeze, Big Bad Sindbad, A Date To Skate
programme.desc: "Popeye learns his girl friend Olive Oyl has gone away with a "young man on a flying trapeze.", Popeye tells his nephews about the time he bested Sinbad., It's Olive's first visit to a skating rink, and Popeye accidentally crashes into the pillar to which she is clinging. Popeye manages to rescue Olive in an amusing climax."

programme.title: The Tom and Jerry Show
programme.sub-title: Bodyguard, The Flying Bear, The Invisible Mouse
programme.desc: "Jerry uses a whistle given to him by a grateful bulldog to stop Tom from chasing him., Barney Bear is in the Army Air Corp as a mechanic but he decides to take a small plane out for a ride and ends up having some trouble with other flyers., Jerry turns invisible after diving into a bottle of invisible ink and then gets back at Tom."

programme.title: The Woody Woodpecker Show
programme.sub-title: Woody Woodpecker Polka, The Big Snooze, Three Lazy Mice, Lonesome Ranger, The Bongo Punch, Rough And Tumbleweed, Tumble Weed Greed
programme.desc: "Woody disguises himself as a lovely lady to woo Wally Walrus and get into the dance for free., Chilly disturbs the hibernation of the bears at Grizzly National Park, and the park ranger tries to stop him., Three lazy mice try to get out of working by claiming to be blind., Woody makes a forest ranger's job difficult., Pepito the Rooster only wants to play the bongos, even though his dad wants him to be a champion fighter., Inspector Willoughby pursues a Wild West outlaw., Woody wins a cash prize and goes on vacation with it, but Buzz Buzzard wants to steal the cash."

programme.title: Bugs Bunny and Friends
programme.sub-title: Compressed Hare, I Taw A Putty Tat, Patient Porky, Barbary-coast Bunny, Wild Over You, Daffy Duck & Egghead, A Witch's Tangled Hare
programme.desc: "Wile E. Coyote becomes Bugs' new neighbor. While the Coyote pretends to be his friend, his real interests are in cooking the rabbit. , Sylvester has eaten every bird that his master gets until she gets Tweety., Porky enters a hospital with a stomach ache and contends with a crazy cat patient posing as a doctor. , Bugs runs into a giant gold boulder, which makes him rich. Unfortunately, Nasty Canasta uses a phony bank to steal Bug's fortune. , A female wildcat paints a white stripe on herself to scare a zookeeper and escape from the zoo at the Paris Exposition. Pepe LePew pursues his love, but any time he showers her with hugs and kisses the claws come out and she attacks., In an episode done in a very Elmer Fudd and Bugs fashion, Daffy and Egghead struggle with each other. , In search of poetic inspiration, William Shakespeare comes across the castle of Macbeth and finds Witch Hazel chasing Bugs Bunny therein. "

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.sub-title: The Night Of The Flying Pie Plate
programme.desc: West gets involved in a bizarre scheme: a green girl emerges from a fallen spaceship claiming she needs gold for fuel.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Kitty Angel finds herself not welcome on the wagon train because of her past. When Flint returns to the train toting a sick indian baby, she has everyone's prejudices to deal with as well as the baby's life-threatening illness.

programme.title: The Big Valley
programme.desc: Two men are found hung, and a note left by each of them claims a third person will die: Victoria Barkley.

programme.title: Gunsmoke
programme.desc: A boy (Eddie Hodges) comes to Dodge City in search of his father, only to learn that he is a wanted criminal.

programme.title: Bonanza
programme.desc: One of Ben Cartwright's old war buddies, who claims to be a business tycoon developing a new territory, woos a wealthy Virginia City widow and jeopardizes a Ponderosa land deal.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A gunslinger rides into North Fork for a meeting with Lucas.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lou looks for a way out when the man her dying father promised her to arrives.

programme.title: Rawhide
programme.desc: Jed intervenes when a card player refuses to surrender the Arabian stallion he lost in a poker game.

programme.title: Have Gun, Will Travel
programme.desc: Paladin is hired to protect Oscar Wilde. Another 3 men apply for the job, but after Paladin upstages them they kidnap Wilde for ransom. Paladin takes care of them, his way.

programme.title: Wanted Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh captures a notorious killer but no one wants to testify against him, until a surprise witness comes forward, his mother.

programme.title: The Three Stooges
programme.sub-title: Three Pests In A Mess, All Gummed Up, Squareheads Of The Round Table, Listen, Judge, They Stooge To Conga, Vagabond Loafers
programme.desc: "The Stooges are three inventors trying to a get a patent on their preposterous fly catching invention. When they learn they'll have to catch 100,000 flies to earn enough to get a patent, some crooks overhear and think the boys are the $100,000 sweepstakes winners. When the crooks give chase, the Stooges hide in a sporting goods store where Curly shoots a dummy, which they mistake for a real person. The boys decide to bury the "body" in a pet cemetery, but the cemetery owner arrives from a costume party with his partners, all dressed as spooks, and they proceed to scare the devil out of the Stooges. , The Stooges run a drug store and are about to have their lease taken away by the Flint, the mean old man who owns the place. When Flint kicks his wife out for being old, the Stooges try to help her by inventing a formula that makes old people young. Their concoction turns the wife into a beautiful young woman, and Flint offers the boys the store for free if they'll transform him as well. They agree, but after he swallows the stuff he turns into an infant, and the boys leave on the run. , The Stooges are plumbers who are called out to a fancy mansion where a high society party is being thrown., Set in Elizabethan times, the Stooges decide to help their friend Cedric the Blacksmith win the hand of the fair princess Elaine. At night the group sneaks into the castle to serenade Elaine, but pick the wrong window and are caught by the King. Tossed in the dungeon, the boys escape with Cedric's help and manage to foil the plans of the Black Prince who was plotting against the King. All turns out well when the grateful King allows Cedric to marry Elaine. , The Stooges becomes servants for the judge that they ran away from., The Stooges are repairmen who get a job fixing the doorbell in large house, which is the secret headquarters of some Nazi spies. They manage to ruin most of the house while working on the wiring and then subdue the spies and sink an enemy submarine by remote control. "

programme.title: Svengoolie
programme.desc: "An American archaeological expedition meets with disaster when they ignore warnings not to desecrate an Egyptian tomb."

programme.title: Batman
programme.desc: Catwoman teams with the Sandman to lure a rich insomniac.

programme.title: Batman
programme.desc: Batman races to save Robin, stop the Sandman from marrying a millionaire and find his missing Batmobile. Meanwhile, the Sandman plans to double-cross Catwoman.

programme.title: Star Trek
programme.desc: The Enterprise encounters an alien who claims to be the Greek god Apollo.

programme.title: Adventures of Superman
programme.desc: Lois Lane is vacationing in Canada when she is kidnapped by gunmen. Jimmy tries to help her, but gets captured as well.

programme.title: Adventures of Superman
programme.desc: A young girl is kidnapped by counterfeiters when she mistakenly receives a phone call meant for them, telling the time and location of a meeting.

programme.title: Lost in Space
programme.desc: After a harp unlocks a passageway to another world, Dr. Smith believes he has ended up in Hell and met the devil.

programme.title: Voyage to the Bottom of the Sea
programme.desc: Nelson and his men battle to stop an aged alchemist who's endangering the whole southern hemisphere to obtain an elixir of youth from an exploding volcano.

programme.title: Land of the Giants
programme.desc: A giant scientist and his assistant hunt the Earthlings using a sound detector from which there is no escape.

programme.title: The Time Tunnel
programme.desc: In an Iron Curtain country, Tony and Doug pose as scientists to investigate a primitive enemy time-tunnel in 1956.
